content: Run build script to compile async kernel (matrix_tensor_async.cu) with proper MSVC environment and /Zc:preprocessor flag
Execute matrix_tensor_async.exe (fp16 and fp8) to collect latency and TFLOPS for baseline, padded, async kernels; generate benchmark JSON
Run Nsight Compute profiling on the three kernels; capture Tensor Core utilization, occupancy, shared-memory metrics; produce CSV/report
Commit benchmark JSON and Nsight profiling reports to the repository (ensure they are not excluded by .gitignore)
Create a signed response to Archivist summarizing the verification results and recommendations (install VS build tools, update build script with /Zc:preprocessor, CI integration)
